task_completion.description: OpenBCI GUI is open and set to PLAYBACK mode
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenBCI GUI application window is visible, and the system control panel indicates 'PLAYBACK' is selected as the data source.

task_completion.description: The correct EEG playback file is loaded
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filename 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' is visible in the playback file selection area or the system control panel.

task_completion.description: The data stream has been started
task_completion.visual_evidence: EEG data traces are visible in the Time Series widget, and the system control button shows 'Stop Data Stream' (indicating it is currently running).

task_completion.description: Time Series Window is set to 5 seconds
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Time Series widget settings or dropdown explicitly shows '5 s' for the window duration, and/or the x-axis of the time series graph spans exactly 5 seconds.

task_completion.description: Time Series Vertical Scale is set to 50 uV
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Time Series widget settings or dropdown explicitly shows '50 uV' for the vertical scale.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenBCI GUI application
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenBCI GUI interface is visible on the screen with its standard widgets and layout, rather than terminal commands or scripts attempting to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Settings were not changed by directly editing configuration files
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) open showing OpenBCI configuration files (e.g., JSON/XML settings files).

integrity.description: The application is rendering genuine EEG data
integrity.visual_evidence: The Time Series widget displays actual multi-channel EEG waveforms (up to 64 channels) rather than being empty, static, or displaying an error message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application is OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2. The target file is 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' loaded in PLAYBACK mode. The Time Series widget should be configured with the Window dropdown set to '5 s' and the Vertical Scale set to '50 uV'. The data contains 64 channels of EEG.
